3:
Sergeant Styrnlona eagerly informs you that the twin vessel, the <Emphasis>Whorleater</Emphasis>, and its towing ship are ready to leave port as soon as you board. The time has come to sail forth and confront the Lord of the Whorl once more.

※The <Emphasis>Whorleater</Emphasis> (Extreme) can be accessed via the Duty Finder.
